The evidence is all over LinkedIn, where perfectly serviceable occupations now arrive wearing titles such as “forward-deployed and agentic AI architect.” That person may be building sophisticated software. Platforms & Products.title: Kansas bank becomes second in a week to fail, fourth this year
Platforms & Products.summary: Small Business Bank in Kansas failed on Friday, the second failure in a week and the fourth failure overall in 2026.

Platforms & Products.title: Citizens will stop lending to firms linked to ICE detention
Platforms & Products.summary: The regional bank faced months of pressure to end its relationship with CoreCivic and The Geo Group, two of the country's largest private prison operators. On Friday, it said it would "exit the credit facilities" it has in place for those companies, attributing the decision to business factors, not pressure from activists.

Platforms & Products.title: Fifth Third says it's using AI to track Comerica conversion
Platforms & Products.summary: Banks use artificial intelligence to do many different jobs. At Fifth Third, the technology is supervising the biggest post-merger integration in the bank's history.
